advert.description: Advert packet: header byte = (0<<6)|(0x04<<2)|(0x01) = 0x11 (version 0, ADVERT, FLOOD route), path_len=0x41 (hashSize=2, count=1), 2-byte hop, then 32-byte pubkey + 4-byte ts + 64-byte sig + appdata(flags+lat+lon+features+name)

group_text.description: Group text: header = (0<<6)|(0x05<<2)|(0x01) = 0x15 (GRP_TXT, FLOOD route), path_len=0x42 (hashSize=2, count=2), two 2-byte hops, then payload 'hello'

direct_text.description: Text message: header = (0<<6)|(0x02<<2)|(0x02) = 0x0a (TXT_MSG, DIRECT route), path_len=0x42 (hashSize=2, count=2), payload 'Hi!'

trace.description: Trace packet: header = (0<<6)|(0x09<<2)|(0x01) = 0x25 (TRACE, FLOOD route), path_len=0x42 (hashSize=2, count=2), then trace payload

ack.description: ACK packet: header = (0<<6)|(0x03<<2)|(0x02) = 0x0e (ACK, DIRECT route), path_len=0x41 (hashSize=2, count=1)

transport_flood.description: Transport flood: header = (0<<6)|(0x05<<2)|(0x00) = 0x14, has 4-byte transport codes, path_len=0x41, then payload

malformed.description: Too short — only 1 byte, missing path_len
